tests.source_program:
define i1 @test(i64 %x) {
entry:
  %cond = icmp ugt i64 %x, 65535
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %mask = and i64 %x, -65521
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %mask, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

issue.title: [ValueTracking] `icmp X, C1` implies `(and X, C2) != C3`
issue.body:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/YjUHm-
```
define i1 @src(i64 %x) {
entry:
  %cond = icmp ugt i64 %x, 65535
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %mask = and i64 %x, -65521
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %mask, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

define i1 @tgt(i64 %x) {
entry:
  ret i1 false
}
```
See also https://github.com/dtcxzyw/llvm-tools/issues/33.
issue.author: dtcxzyw

comments.author: zsrkmyn
comments.body:
I drafted a patch here zsrkmyn@35f0566961931c0e093d2453f6b3afcca598e299, but still not well refined and tested.

I'll send a PR when it's ready.

tests.test_body:
declare void @use(i1)

define void @test.and(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test.and(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C0:%.*]] = icmp uge i64 [[X:%.*]], 138
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C1:%.*]] = icmp ule i64 [[X]], 161
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C0]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C1]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C2:%.*]] = icmp uge i64 [[Y:%.*]], 186
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C3:%.*]] = icmp ule i64 [[Y]], 188
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C2]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C3]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i64 [[X]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i1 false)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R1:%.*]] = icmp ult i64 [[AND]], 137
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i1 [[R1]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
entry:
  %c0 = icmp uge i64 %x, 138
  %c1 = icmp ule i64 %x, 161
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c0)
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c1)
  %c2 = icmp uge i64 %y, 186
  %c3 = icmp ule i64 %y, 188
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c2)
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c3)
  %and = and i64 %x, %y
  %r0 = icmp ult i64 %and, 136
  call void @use(i1 %r0)
  %r1 = icmp ult i64 %and, 137
  call void @use(i1 %r1)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
declare void @use(i1)

define void @test.or(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test.or(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C0:%.*]] = icmp ule i64 [[X:%.*]], 117
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C1:%.*]] = icmp uge i64 [[X]], 95
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C0]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C1]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C2:%.*]] = icmp ule i64 [[Y:%.*]], 69
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C3:%.*]] = icmp uge i64 [[Y]], 67
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C2]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[C3]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or i64 [[X]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i1 false)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R1:%.*]] = icmp ugt i64 [[OR]], 118
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i1 [[R1]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
entry:
  %c0 = icmp ule i64 %x, 117
  %c1 = icmp uge i64 %x, 95
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c0)
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c1)
  %c2 = icmp ule i64 %y, 69
  %c3 = icmp uge i64 %y, 67
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c2)
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %c3)
  %or = or i64 %x, %y
  %r0 = icmp ugt i64 %or, 119
  call void @use(i1 %r0)
  %r1 = icmp ugt i64 %or, 118
  call void @use(i1 %r1)
  ret void
}
